items.name: reflexio
items.description: Make your agents improve themselves. Reflexio is an AI agent self-improvement harness that enables your AI agents to continuously learn from real user interactions.

items.name: google-analytics-mcp
items.description: Google Analytics 4 data to AI agents, agentic workflows, and MCP clients. Give agents analysis-ready access to website traffic, user behavior, and performance data with schema discovery, server-side aggregation, and safe defaults that reduce data wrangling.

items.name: openhanako
items.description: A personal AI agent with memory, personality, and autonomy.

items.name: agents-js
items.description: Build realtime multimodal AI agents with Node.js

items.name: claw-orchestrator
items.description: Run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor Agent and custom coding CLIs as one unified runtime for claw-style agent systems. Runs standalone, with first-class OpenClaw plugin support.

items.name: PhantomCrowd-Simulacra
items.description: PhantomCrowd AI Marketing Simulator 2026: Content Spread Forecasting with Local LLM

items.name: cccc
items.description: Coordinate your coding agents like a group chat — read receipts, delivery tracking, and remote ops from your phone. One pip install, zero infrastructure. A production‑minded orchestrator for 24/7 workflow

items.name: AI-company
items.description: Multi-agent team operating system for Claude Code. 108 MCP tools, 40+ agent templates, 10 lifecycle hooks, 7 pipeline workflows. Persistent teams, structured meetings, task wall, real-time React dashboard. No LangChain/AutoGen — pure CC native integration.

items.name: ponytail
items.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

items.name: MisakaNet
items.description: 📚 A zero-dependency, git-backed micro-lesson library for AI Agents to asynchronously share and search verified debugging experience. Python stdlib only. | https://misakanet.org
